stack.hosting: Local backend, GitHub Pages for frontend

stages.name: Skeleton
stages.goal: Frontend and backend talking to each other. No Claude, no graph.
tasks: Write app.py with one route: POST /chat returns hello
Write index.html with text input that calls /chat
stages.done_when: Browser talks to backend, backend responds.

stages.name: Graph Foundation
stages.goal: Schema implemented in NetworkX, graph saves and loads correctly.
tasks: Write graph.py — implement all 8 node types and 15 edge types from schema
Write seed_data.py — manually encode 10-15 existing dream entries
Confirm graph saves to data/graph.json and loads back correctly
Write one test query: show me all dreams
stages.done_when: Graph loads, a dream entry can be added programmatically, basic query returns results.

stages.name: Claude API Extraction
stages.goal: Paste in a dream narrative, get back structured nodes and edges.
stages.deadline_note: Must be complete by April 16 — Check-in #2.
tasks: Set up API key in environment variable — never committed to repo
Write extraction prompt in prompts.py — returns structured JSON matching schema
Write extract.py — sends narrative to Claude, parses response, writes to graph
Test with Grand Am dream entry
stages.done_when: Dream narrative goes in, structured graph data comes out, graph updates.

stages.name: Frontend Entry Flow
stages.goal: Working chat UI that logs a dream and updates the graph.
tasks: Add Save to journal button that triggers extraction on close
Build review card — shows extracted nodes before writing to graph
Add Life Context Window display — always visible, update link
Test full entry flow end to end
stages.done_when: User can have a dream conversation, review extracted data, confirm write to graph — all in browser.

stages.name: Query Views + Demo Polish
stages.goal: Pattern filter views, before/after demo, presentation-ready.
tasks: Build journal.html — graph query and pattern view page
stages.done_when: 10-minute demo can be delivered live without notes.

demo_script.what: The problem — show raw dream chat. Brilliant but locked, unsearchable, non-cumulative.
The solution — show the graph. Two layers: dream entries + life context windows.
Live entry — log a new dream, show Claude responding, show extraction review card, confirm write.
Pattern queries — navigation failure dreams, themes during transition periods, before/after delta.
Recurring series — show duplex dream series timeline.
Wrap — who pays for this, roadmap, what AI made possible.

key_decisions: NetworkX over Neo4j — simpler setup, no separate database, graph as JSON file
Extraction runs once per entry after conversation closes — not mid-conversation
is_recurring and is_novel are user-asserted only — never system-inferred
Local backend during demo — GitHub Pages for frontend only
Before/after delta uses Grand Am dream as anchor example
